Foil.name: Foil
Foil.description: A thin, lightweight fencing blade favored for its exceptional accuracy over raw power.

Hatchet.name: Hatchet
Hatchet.description: A small single-handed axe, easy to carry but punishing when it lands.

Sling.name: Sling
Sling.description: A simple leather strap that hurls stones with surprising speed and force.

Wooden Rod.name: Wooden Rod
Wooden Rod.description: A staff carved from a living branch, imbued with the quiet essence of the forest.

Rapier.name: Rapier
Rapier.description: A slender thrusting sword prized by duelists for its speed and deadly precision.

Broadsword.name: Broadsword
Broadsword.description: A wide-bladed sword built for powerful, sweeping strikes that overwhelm enemy defenses.

Troll Club.name: Troll Club
Troll Club.description: A massive stone-headed club torn from the earth by troll hands, radiating raw earthen power.

Poleaxe.name: Poleaxe
Poleaxe.description: A long-hafted axe that combines the reach of a spear with the brutal force of an axe head.

Iron Sword.name: Iron Sword
Iron Sword.description: A reliable iron blade, the standard weapon of soldiers and adventurers the world over.

Iron Lance.name: Iron Lance
Iron Lance.description: A sturdy iron-tipped lance offering solid reach and dependable performance in infantry combat.

Iron Axe.name: Iron Axe
Iron Axe.description: A heavy iron axe that sacrifices finesse for sheer destructive power.

Iron Dagger.name: Iron Dagger
Iron Dagger.description: A short iron blade, easy to conceal and quick to draw in a desperate moment.

Iron Bow.name: Iron Bow
Iron Bow.description: An iron-reinforced bow offering consistent range and reliability for any archer.

Iron Rod.name: Iron Rod
Iron Rod.description: A dense iron staff that channels magical energy with steady, unwavering focus.

Slime Spear.name: Slime Spear
Slime Spear.description: A spear coated in viscous toxic slime that poisons any wound it inflicts.

Fishbone Dagger.name: Fishbone Dagger
Fishbone Dagger.description: A jagged dagger fashioned out of fishbones.

Scimitar.name: Scimitar
Scimitar.description: A heavy curved blade devastating when it connects, though its arc demands room to swing.

Hand Axe.name: Hand Axe
Hand Axe.description: A compact axe balanced for both throwing at a distance and close-quarters combat.

Iron Claws.name: Iron Claws
Iron Claws.description: Fitted iron claws that tear into flesh with frightening precision, seeking vital points.

Elven Sword.name: Elven Sword
Elven Sword.description: A graceful sword of elven craft, light as thought and keen as the sharpest mind.

Thief's Dagger.name: Thief's Dagger
Thief's Dagger.description: A blade honed through countless heists, so well-balanced it seems to find its mark on its own.

Bloody Dagger.name: Bloody Dagger
Bloody Dagger.description: A dagger stained with the blood of many victims, notorious for finding vulnerable spots.

Spirit Lance.name: Spirit Lance
Spirit Lance.description: A lance that hums with spiritual energy, its thrusts guided by unseen forces toward their mark.

Machete.name: Machete
Machete.description: A broad, heavy-bladed tool repurposed into a brutal weapon that hacks through anything in its path.

Sacrificial Knife.name: Sacrificial Knife
Sacrificial Knife.description: A ritual blade used in dark ceremonies, its edge honed to find the heart of any sacrifice.

Greataxe.name: Greataxe
Greataxe.description: A colossal two-handed axe capable of felling an enemy in a single thunderous blow.

Bloody Claws.name: Bloody Claws
Bloody Claws.description: Jagged claws perpetually soaked in blood, made to shred and tear with terrifying precision.

Killer Axe.name: Killer Axe
Killer Axe.description: A keenly honed axe designed to slip through gaps in armor and land devastating, fatal blows.

Skull Staff.name: Skull Staff
Skull Staff.description: A staff topped with a grinning skull that channels dark energy, striking dread into all who face it.

Fairy Bow.name: Fairy Bow
Fairy Bow.description: A bow blessed by fairies, its arrows trailing light as they arc unerringly toward their targets.

Javelin.name: Javelin
Javelin.description: A lightweight throwing spear built for both hurling at range and thrusting in close quarters.

Winged Spear.name: Winged Spear
Winged Spear.description: A spear fitted with winged crossguards, the favored weapon of elite cavalry and royal guards.

Glaive.name: Glaive
Glaive.description: A long pole topped with a curving blade, offering lethal reach that few opponents can close.

Frost Staff.name: Frost Staff
Frost Staff.description: A staff crackling with frozen energy that chills the air around it and ices over enemy wounds.

Fire Staff.name: Fire Staff
Fire Staff.description: A staff perpetually wreathed in flames, unleashing searing blasts that burn through armor and flesh.

Dragon Blade.name: Dragon Blade
Dragon Blade.description: A sword said to have been forged from a dragon's fang, carrying a faint remnant of draconic power.

Falchion.name: Falchion
Falchion.description: A single-edged blade with a weighted tip that delivers crushing, bone-breaking blows.

Flamesword.name: Flamesword
Flamesword.description: A blade blazing with elemental fire that sears every wound it opens, leaving burns that linger.

Battleaxe.name: Battleaxe
Battleaxe.description: A formidable two-handed axe carried by veteran warriors into the heart of the fiercest battles.

Gauntlet.name: Gauntlet
Gauntlet.description: Reinforced iron gauntlets that transform every punch into a hammer blow capable of denting armor.

Forest Axe.name: Forest Axe
Forest Axe.description: An axe crafted from ancient forest hardwood and iron, humming quietly with the power of the wild.

Gorgon Sword.name: Gorgon Sword
Gorgon Sword.description: A venom-laced blade that poisons every wound it opens, slowly turning cuts into something far worse.

Lost Sword.name: Lost Sword
Lost Sword.description: A blade of unknown origin recovered from forgotten ruins, as sharp as the day it was first forged.

Spirit Rod.name: Spirit Rod
Spirit Rod.description: A staff of pure concentrated spiritual energy, devastating in power but difficult to aim with precision.

Ent Club.name: Ent Club
Ent Club.description: A massive branch torn from an ancient ent, pulsing with primordial forest energy and immense weight.

Watcher Spear.name: Watcher Spear
Watcher Spear.description: A spear carried by the silent watchers of old, its thrust patient and unerring as a hawk's dive.

Relic Sword.name: Relic Sword
Relic Sword.description: An ancient sword of immense power unearthed from a forgotten era, its blade never missing its mark.

Silver Sword.name: Silver Sword
Silver Sword.description: A finely crafted silver blade that strikes with uncanny accuracy, bane of the undead and corrupted.

Stone Axe.name: Stone Axe
Stone Axe.description: A monolithic axe hewn from living stone, so massive it shatters armor and bone with each crushing blow.

Ancient Staff.name: Ancient Staff
Ancient Staff.description: A staff from a forgotten age wielding tremendous arcane power that is nearly impossible to control.

Geometry Staff.name: Geometry Staff
Geometry Staff.description: A staff inscribed with arcane geometric patterns that channel magical energy with exceptional efficiency.

Longsword.name: Longsword
Longsword.description: A classic double-edged sword offering a balanced blend of reach, power, and control.

Spear.name: Spear
Spear.description: A simple but effective pole weapon, the backbone of countless armies throughout history.

Recurve Bow.name: Recurve Bow
Recurve Bow.description: A bow whose recurved limbs store extra energy, delivering powerful shots with reliable accuracy.

Sword of Maciera.name: Sword of Maciera
Sword of Maciera.description: A legendary sword wielded by the founder of Bertunia.
